markdown:
#  Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Team** tool.
  3. Click the name of the user that you want to edit information for.
  4. Click the **edit** ![Icon Edit2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/60cfc64d76d10b52cd7d785b4bfdc9e5/794e5b31acad2246f1d1f6fb29a3d532/icon-edit2.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  5. Edit the information or permissions as necessary.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [View Users in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/view-users-in-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/assign-a-user-as-a-bid-contact-in-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
title: Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account
description: How to edit information or permissions for a user in your free Procore account.
